            box-sizing: border-box;
            height: 100%;

          }
          body {
            display: grid;
            grid-template-rows: auto auto 1fr auto;
            grid-template-columns: 100%;
            min-height: 100%;
            margin: 0;

            line-height: var(--font-body-line-height);
            color: var(--color-base);

        	--fill: var(--auto-text-color-button-light);}

.section-tags .btn {
  --background: purple;

  --fill: white;

}

  --color: white;
  --fill: white;

        .visually-hidden {

          padding: 0;
        }
        .announcement-bar{
          opacity:0;
        }
        .popup-modal{
          display: none;
        }.js #MainContent{
          opacity:0;
          transition: opacity 1s var(--animation-bezier);
        }
        .js.dom-loaded #MainContent{
          opacity:1;
        }.js img.image-show--fadein{
          opacity:0;
          transition: opacity 1s var(--animation-bezier);
        }
        .js img.image-show--fadein.image-loaded{
          opacity: 1;
        }</style>

  <body>
    <!-- Slide Cart Edits Start -->
    <script>
      document.addEventListener('click', (e) => {
        const submitButton = e.target.closest('.product-form__submit');
        if (!submitButton) return;

        submitButton.style.opacity = "0.5";
        submitButton.classList.add('loading');

        const spinner = submitButton.querySelector('.loading-overlay__spinner');
        if (!spinner) return;

        spinner.classList.remove('hidden');
        spinner.style.display = 'inline-block';

        window.SLIDECART_UPDATED = (cart) => {
          submitButton.style.opacity = "1";
          submitButton.classList.remove('loading');
          spinner.classList.add('hidden');
          spinner.style.display = 'none';
        };
      });
    </script>
    <!-- Slide Cart Edits End -->

    var sp_videos = document.querySelectorAll(`#sp-template--19800393548033__sp_media_grid_4KixBU .sp-video-container video`);
  
    for(var x=0; x<sp_videos.length; x++) {
  
      sp_videos[x].parentNode.setAttribute('data-state', 'paused'); 
  
      if(sp_videos[x].hasAttribute('autoplay')) {
          sp_videos[x].parentNode.setAttribute('data-state', 'playing');
      }
      else {
          sp_videos[x].parentNode.setAttribute('data-state', 'paused');
        
      }
      
      sp_videos[x].addEventListener('click', (e) => {
  
        if (e.target.paused) {
          e.target.play();
          e.target.parentNode.setAttribute('data-state', 'playing');
        }
        else { 
          e.target.pause();
          e.target.parentNode.setAttribute('data-state', 'paused');    
        }  
      });

    </div><toggle-component class="grid justify-content-center chm-toggle--accordion">
      <div class="col-st-12 col-6"><details class="chm-toggle" >
          <summary>
            <div class="chm-toggle__button">
              <h5 class="mt0 mb0">
              Why should I switch from my regular Atta / Rice to sugar.fit's Active Sugar Control Atta / Rice?
              </h5><svg class="theme-icon" width="12" height="12" viewBox="0 0 12 12" fill="none" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg">
<path fill-rule="evenodd" clip-rule="evenodd" d="M6.31062 6.68938L2.51773 2.89648L1.10352 4.3107L6.31062 9.5178L11.5177 4.3107L10.1035 2.89648L6.31062 6.68938Z" fill="#142C73"/>
</svg></div>
          </summary>
          <div class="mt0 section__richtext__editor chm-toggle__content mt--first-child-0 body2">
            <p>Sugar.fit’s Active Sugar Control Atta and Rice are scientifically formulated with a low glycemic index (GI) to help manage blood sugar levels effectively. Unlike regular atta and rice, these products break down more slowly in the body, leading to a gradual release of glucose. This helps reduce post-meal sugar spikes, supports better metabolism, and can aid in weight management. Whether you're diabetic, pre-diabetic, or simply health-conscious, this switch offers a smarter, healthier staple for your daily meals.</p>
          </div>
        </details><details class="chm-toggle" >
          <summary>
            <div class="chm-toggle__button">
              <h5 class="mt0 mb0">
              What is Low GI? How does it help me as a person who has Diabetes?
              </h5><svg class="theme-icon" width="12" height="12" viewBox="0 0 12 12" fill="none" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg">
<path fill-rule="evenodd" clip-rule="evenodd" d="M6.31062 6.68938L2.51773 2.89648L1.10352 4.3107L6.31062 9.5178L11.5177 4.3107L10.1035 2.89648L6.31062 6.68938Z" fill="#142C73"/>
</svg></div>
          </summary>
          <div class="mt0 section__richtext__editor chm-toggle__content mt--first-child-0 body2">
            <p>The Glycemic Index (GI) is a measure of how quickly carbohydrate-containing foods raise blood sugar levels.<br/><br/>Low GI: Less than 55<br/>High GI: Greater than 70<br/><br/>Low GI foods digest more slowly, causing a gradual rise in blood sugar rather than a sharp spike. For someone with diabetes, this means better blood sugar control, reduced insulin demand, and lower risk of complications. Consuming low GI foods like sugar.fit’s Active Atta and Rice helps in maintaining stable glucose levels, making them a beneficial part of a diabetic-friendly diet.</p>
          </div>
        </details><details class="chm-toggle" >
          <summary>
            <div class="chm-toggle__button">
              <h5 class="mt0 mb0">
              Can my whole family have this product even if they are not looking to lose weight or manage their blood sugar levels?
              </h5><svg class="theme-icon" width="12" height="12" viewBox="0 0 12 12" fill="none" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg">
<path fill-rule="evenodd" clip-rule="evenodd" d="M6.31062 6.68938L2.51773 2.89648L1.10352 4.3107L6.31062 9.5178L11.5177 4.3107L10.1035 2.89648L6.31062 6.68938Z" fill="#142C73"/>
</svg></div>
          </summary>
          <div class="mt0 section__richtext__editor chm-toggle__content mt--first-child-0 body2">
            <p>Yes, absolutely. Sugar.fit’s Active Sugar Control Atta and Rice are suitable for everyone in the family—not just those managing blood sugar or trying to lose weight. These products are made with high-quality ingredients and are a healthier alternative to regular atta or rice. They support better digestion, sustained energy, and overall wellness, making them a smart and nutritious choice for everyday meals for the whole household.</p>
          </div>
        </details><details class="chm-toggle" >
          <summary>
            <div class="chm-toggle__button">
              <h5 class="mt0 mb0">
              Can people with Diabetes consume staples from the Active Foods range?
              </h5><svg class="theme-icon" width="12" height="12" viewBox="0 0 12 12" fill="none" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg">
<path fill-rule="evenodd" clip-rule="evenodd" d="M6.31062 6.68938L2.51773 2.89648L1.10352 4.3107L6.31062 9.5178L11.5177 4.3107L10.1035 2.89648L6.31062 6.68938Z" fill="#142C73"/>
</svg></div>
          </summary>
          <div class="mt0 section__richtext__editor chm-toggle__content mt--first-child-0 body2">
            <p>Yes, sugar.fit's Active Foods range is specifically designed to be diabetic-friendly. These products typically have a low glycemic index (GI), which means they release glucose more slowly into the bloodstream, helping to maintain stable blood sugar levels. This makes them a safer and healthier option for people managing diabetes compared to traditional staples.</p>
          </div>
        </details><details class="chm-toggle" >

<path fill-rule="evenodd" clip-rule="evenodd" d="M6.31062 6.68938L2.51773 2.89648L1.10352 4.3107L6.31062 9.5178L11.5177 4.3107L10.1035 2.89648L6.31062 6.68938Z" fill="#142C73"/>
</svg></div>
          </summary>
          <div class="mt0 section__richtext__editor chm-toggle__content mt--first-child-0 body2">
            <p>Absolutely. <br/>Sugar.fit’s Active Sugar Control Atta & Rice are great choices for those on a weight loss journey. Their low GI properties help control hunger by providing sustained energy and reducing spikes and crashes in blood sugar, which can lead to cravings. Additionally, these products can support better metabolism and satiety, making it easier to stick to your dietary goals.</p>

</svg></div>
